insight: On LOCATION_PERIOD spawn rules, `Delay` is counted from the last successful spawn (Last_Executed), not from boss death — so if the boss survives longer than Delay, the cooldown has already expired by the time it dies and it respawns on the next tick. RESPAWN_AFTER_DEATH handles death-cooldown correctly via its own canRun(boss, data) override using getLastDeathTime().
